forbidden_scope: hosted registry, marketplace, sync, public contribution review, crawler queue, benchmark harness, or true write execution

integration_evidence.summary: Milestone #8 technical baseline covers Lode asset/tooling boundaries, file responsibilities, JSON Schema authority, fixture/post-check validation, tooling minimums, and deferred/rejected scope.
Contracts index links ADR 0005 and names future tooling skeleton entry points without creating them.
Repository agent constraints now include technical stack, dependency, test, change-scope, and security forbidden-scope guidance for the baseline.
GH-73 is the primary Loom item; GH-72 and GH-74 through GH-81 are mirrored as covered but not closed.
Current fact-chain locator is synchronized from GH-70 to GH-73 for this PR.
